steps.title: Find the criticism
steps.content: The student criticizes historians who evaluate Lumumba mainly as a symbol rather than in terms of his actions. The supporting quotation must show that same symbol-over-actions contrast.

steps.title: Match the quotation
steps.content: A says Lumumba is hard to evaluate, B discusses consistency in his beliefs, and D concerns unanswered questions about his vision. The quotation that passes over practical accomplishments and emphasizes personification directly illustrates the student's criticism. The answer is C.
